title: Buy Alerts All light up like a Christmas 🎄
author: Patient-Knowledge915

comments.author: Jonny_JonJon
comments.body: Does the list update like that by itself or you're the one that manually create it?

replies.author: Patient-Knowledge915
replies.body: Outomated or when you run the script

replies.author: Patient-Knowledge915
replies.body: All calls are based on Cycle Trading Signal. The Google sheet monitors price action and gives you an extra entry before targets hit or better entry point if the price action goes down after the initial price. All these lists have 70% and higher accuracy 12/2025 when way higher than 70% Accuracy.

replies.author: CitizenWaffle
replies.body: what’s the win rate and biggest theoretical/actual drawdown

replies.author: Patient-Knowledge915
replies.body: With lists Accuracy from the lowest 67.5 Accuracy, my winning rates are 35% gains just trading on set targets, some go way over targets, and a better trader can do way better with this information.
